\section{<Experiment Name>}

% ── Slide 1: Experiment Design (Goal + Metrics + Rationale) ──────────

\begin{frame}[fragile]{<Experiment Name>: Experiment Design}
\begin{columns}[T]
\begin{column}{0.50\textwidth}

  \textbf{Goal}\\[3pt]
  {\small <2–3 sentences describing what this experiment tests and why.>}

  \vspace{0.6em}
  \textbf{Metrics}
  \begin{description}[\textbf{CWE recall}]
    \item[\textbf{hit@K}] <Definition of hit@K in this context.>
    \item[\textbf{MRR}] <Definition of MRR.>
    \item[\textbf{CWE recall}] <Definition of CWE recall.>
    % Add or remove metrics as needed
  \end{description}

  \vspace{0.6em}
  \textbf{Rationale}\\[3pt]
  {\small <Why does this experiment matter? What hypothesis does it test?>}

\end{column}
\begin{column}{0.47\textwidth}

  % Option A: Bar chart summary
  \centering
  \begin{tikzpicture}[scale=0.8]
    \foreach \y/\lbl/\col/\val in {
      3.6/{<Condition 1>}/c1/<value>,
      2.7/{<Condition 2>}/c2/<value>,
      1.8/{<Condition 3>}/c3/<value>,
      0.9/{<Condition 4>}/hit/<value>,
      0.0/{<Condition 5>}/miss/<value>}{
      \node[left,font=\tiny\sffamily,text width=3cm,align=right] at (0,\y) {\lbl};
      \fill[\col!70,rounded corners=1pt] (0.1,\y-0.22) rectangle ({0.1+4.5*\val},\y+0.22);
      \node[right,font=\tiny\sffamily\bfseries,\col!80!black] at ({0.1+4.5*\val+0.05},\y) {\val};
    }
    \draw[black!15] (0.1,-0.3)--(0.1,4.1);
  \end{tikzpicture}

  % Option B: Compact setup table (uncomment if preferred)
  % {\small
  % \renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.25}
  % \begin{tabular}{p{2.0cm}p{4.5cm}}
  %   \toprule
  %   \textbf{Parameter} & \textbf{Value} \\
  %   \midrule
  %   Split     & 225 index, 73 query (seed=42) \\
  %   Embedders & Combined, GIN, WL, CodeBERT \\
  %   Backend   & FAISS Flat (exact) \\
  %   \bottomrule
  % \end{tabular}}

\end{column}
\end{columns}
\end{frame}

\begin{frame}{<Experiment Name>: Results}

  \centering

  \renewcommand{\arraystretch}{1.35}
  \setlength{\tabcolsep}{5pt}
  \begin{tabular}{l *{3}{c} c *{3}{c}}
    \toprule
    & \multicolumn{3}{c}{\textbf{<Condition A>}}
    && \multicolumn{3}{c}{\textbf{<Condition B>}} \\
    \cmidrule{2-4} \cmidrule{6-8}
    \textbf{Embedder}
      & hit@1 & MRR & CWE
      && hit@1 & MRR & CWE \\
    \midrule
    \rowcolor{c1!12}
    Combined
      & \chit{84.9\%} & \chit{.890} & \chit{.501}
      && 74.0\% & .780 & .398 \\
    GIN
      & 72.6\% & .788 & .443
      && 72.6\% & .788 & .443 \\
    CodeBERT
      & 75.3\% & .793 & .412
      && 76.7\% & .799 & .402 \\
    WL
      & 65.8\% & .720 & .423
      && \cmiss{45.2\%} & .550 & .300 \\
    \bottomrule
  \end{tabular}}

  \vspace{0.6em}
  % Three-column interpretation below the table
  \begin{columns}[T]
  \begin{column}{0.32\textwidth}
    {\small\textbf{\textcolor{hit}{<Interpretation 1 title>}}}
    \begin{itemize}\setlength{\itemsep}{2pt}
      {\scriptsize
      \item <Key observation from Condition A>
      \item <Supporting detail>}
    \end{itemize}
  \end{column}
  \begin{column}{0.32\textwidth}
    {\small\textbf{\textcolor{warn}{<Interpretation 2 title>}}}
    \begin{itemize}\setlength{\itemsep}{2pt}
      {\scriptsize
      \item <Key observation from comparison>
      \item <Supporting detail>}
    \end{itemize}
  \end{column}
  \begin{column}{0.32\textwidth}
    {\small\textbf{\textcolor{miss}{<Interpretation 3 title>}}}
    \begin{itemize}\setlength{\itemsep}{2pt}
      {\scriptsize
      \item <Key observation about failures>
      \item <Supporting detail>}
    \end{itemize}
  \end{column}
  \end{columns}
\end{frame}
